Headline: #39 Pershing Temporary Reroute near 39th/Ellis
ShortDescription: 39 Pershing buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near 39th/Ellis.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#39 Pershing buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near 39th/Ellis.

Eastbound buses will operate via 39th, Cottage Grove, 43rd, Oakenwald, and over normal route.

Westbound buses will operate via 42nd, Berkley, 43rd, Cottage Grove, Pershing, and over normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Blue Line Trains bypassing Kedzie-Homan Station
ShortDescription: Blue Line trains are running, but not stopping at Kedzie-Homan, due to police activity.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue Line trains are running, but not stopping at Kedzie-Homan, due to police activity. 

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:

#7 Harrison

#52 Kedzie

See station personnel for further assistance, and pay attention to announcements on trains and at stations for service information.

We are working to restore service as quickly as possible. Allow extra travel time.
